tasks.instruction: In a web application project, create a new boolean feature flag and configure it so that in one production environment it is turned on for 25% of users and in a staging environment it is turned on for 100% of users.

tasks.instruction: Configure an existing boolean feature flag so that only users on a premium plan in either of two specified North American countries receive it turned on, explicitly forcing it off for one particular user while keeping the default behavior off for everyone else.

target_names: Premium users in US or CA (Production)

tasks.instruction: For a payment-related feature flag in a web application project’s production environment, set up an automation rule that automatically turns the flag off whenever its associated error-rate metric exceeds 5 percent.
